title: Add hunting & fishing highlight to homepage

requirements.summary: Add a prominent hunting and fishing callout section to the HomePage hero area that highlights Jackman, Maine as a world-class hunting and fishing destination, styled with the Northern Maine wilderness theme and linking to the Recreation & Outdoors page.
acceptanceCriteria: The homepage displays a clearly visible section or callout stating Jackman is known for hunting and fishing.
The callout includes a brief descriptive line referencing hunting and fishing opportunities in the area.
The element links to the Recreation & Outdoors page.
Styling is consistent with the existing Northern Maine wilderness theme (forest greens, amber/wood-tone accents).
The addition does not break existing homepage layout or navigation.

file_operations.description: Add a dedicated hunting and fishing callout section within the hero area or immediately after it. The callout should include a prominent heading such as 'World-Class Hunting & Fishing Destination' and a supporting description mentioning trophy deer, moose, bear hunting, and fishing on the Moose River and area lakes. Style the section with forest green background (bg-forest-800 or bg-forest-900), amber accent borders or highlights, and ensure it is visually distinct. Include a Link component that navigates to '/recreation' (the Recreation & Outdoors page). Position this callout prominently so it's immediately visible on page load, either as a banner within the hero section or as the first content block after the hero.
